_meta.name: ForEach Loop
_meta.description: Iterate over an array with @items() reference. Runs in parallel by default; set operationOptions to 'Sequential' for ordered processing. Max 5,000 items per loop (100 in express mode).

placeholders.{{LOOP_NAME}}: Display name for the loop step
placeholders.{{ITEM_ACTION_NAME}}: Name of the action inside the loop

_notes.parallel_vs_sequential: Default is parallel (up to 20 concurrent). Add "operationOptions": "Sequential" to force ordered execution.
_notes.item_reference: Inside the loop, use @items('LoopName') to access the current item.
_notes.max_items: Default limit: 5,000 items. Express mode: 100 items. Set 'runtimeConfiguration.concurrency.repetitions' to control parallelism.
_notes.nested_loops: Supported but deeply nested loops hurt performance. Prefer flattening with Compose or Select actions.
